body.title: Node operation primitives: node_create, node_link, search_from, twm_push
body.result: Implemented: prim_node_create, prim_node_link, prim_node_search, prim_twm_push. All registered + seeded. Unblocks PROC_PORTABILITY (node_search filters by type).
body.description: 4 primitives for graph manipulation from within a habit. prim_node_create(narrative_key, type, parent_id_key, out_id_key) -> creates memory node, stores id in basket. prim_node_link(from_key, to_key, weight) -> adds interpretive edge. prim_search_from(node_id_key, query_key, out_key) -> traverse from specific node not CP roots. prim_twm_push(content_key, salience, urgency) -> thin wrapper on cortex.twm_push. These let habits build the graph, not just read it.
